name: Snickers Candy Bar Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In the top of a double boiler, combine the cut-up Snickers bars, water, and peanut butter. Heat and stir until well melted and blended.
2. Mix together the flour, baking soda, and salt in a separate bowl.
3. Cream the butter thoroughly in a large bowl.
4. Gradually add sugar and beat until fluffy.
5. Beat in 4 egg yolks and add vanilla. Beat in the cooled candy bar mix, mixing until smooth.
6. Add 1/4 cup buttermilk and stir in the flour mixture alternately with the remaining 1 cup buttermilk, mixing only until blended.
7. Gently fold in 4 stiffly beaten egg whites.
8. Divide the batter evenly between 2 greased and floured 9-inch square pans.
9. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 45–55 minutes.
10. Cool in the pans on a rack for 5 minutes, then turn out onto a rack to finish cooling.
11. Serve with sweetened whipped cream.
